summary: Tested Dashboard Operations (Antonella) feature. All 16 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend dashboard works correctly with 3 sections: Partner, Contenuti, Campagne ADV. Claudio's sidebar shows 'Vista Antonella' menu item with purple styling. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue in /api/operations/contenuti/commento endpoint.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - DB has no active partners (expected per requirements)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard Operations fully functional. Antonella login shows dedicated dashboard with Partner/Contenuti/Campagne ADV sections. Claudio's admin sidebar includes 'Vista Antonella' button with purple styling that opens /dashboard/operations in new tab. All CRUD operations for campagne_adv collection working.

backend_endpoints.POST /api/operations/campagne: ✅ Creates new campaign with all fields

frontend_antonella_dashboard.login: ✅ Antonella logs in and sees Operations Dashboard
frontend_antonella_dashboard.sidebar_navigation: ✅ Partner, Contenuti, Campagne ADV buttons work

frontend_claudio_dashboard.login: ✅ Claudio logs in and sees Admin Dashboard
frontend_claudio_dashboard.vista_antonella_styling: ✅ Purple background (#F0ECFA), purple text (#7B68AE), purple border

fix_applied.description: Added deletion of MongoDB _id from commento_doc before returning response to fix ObjectId serialization error
